method.claim: Exact-full TS2Vec / exact-window blended k-center selector with artifact-aware trace rerank.
known_limitations: The final ranking uses the current promoted TS2Vec checkpoint, not a newly retrained fixed-crop checkpoint.
The window-stat and TS2Vec old-support views are both exact full-support for the provided old corpus.
The final artifact should not be described as validated clean TS2Vec active learning.
The external held-out evaluator remains the real test.
method.name: artifact-gate exact-full TS2Vec / exact-window blend
